iteration_verdict: IMPROVED - Most non-link issues addressed well. Hero restructured into scannable bullets, font sizes converted to rem, agent grid expanded, version badge contextualized, and a distinctive blueprint aesthetic added. However, the #1 critical issue (broken GitHub links) was only cosmetically changed (new URL still 404s), which caps craft and overall scores.

new_additions: Blueprint/technical drawing aesthetic (grid background, corner marks, crosshairs)
SVG noise texture overlay at 3% opacity
Animated terminal demo (macOS-style window, 7 lines staggered output, replays on scroll)
Hero stats row (29 Agents, 22 Skills, 19 Commands, 16 Parallel Reviewers)
Pipeline progress bar with animated multi-color gradient
Colored bullet dots in hero (blue, violet, emerald)
Gradient accent lines (blue-to-cyan) at hero bottom and footer top
Active nav section tracking via IntersectionObserver
Mobile hamburger menu with animated transform
Agent cards now have type badges (Review, Research, Design, Workflow)
Two featured agent cards spanning 2 columns

findings.description: ALL 4 external GitHub links STILL return 404. URL changed from rafayels-engineering/rafayels-engineering to RafayelGardishyan/rafayels-engineering but repo does not exist. Second iteration with broken conversion path.
findings.recommendation: Create the actual GitHub repository or point links to one that exists.

findings.description: View on Marketplace CTA still links to a 404 page. Primary conversion funnel remains broken.
findings.recommendation: This link must resolve before any other work matters.

findings.description: CTA section h2 still uses px in clamp(): clamp(24px, 3.5vw, 36px). Sole remaining px-based font-size.
Page still has zero tags. Blueprint aesthetic helps but one real illustration would add visual weight.
findings.recommendation: Add one SVG illustration in the hero or capabilities section.

findings.description: Copy-to-clipboard buttons still lack visible error handling.
findings.recommendation: Add try/catch with success/error toast feedback.

findings.description: Blueprint corner marks and crosshair decorations may overlap content on narrow viewports.
findings.recommendation: Verify hidden/repositioned at mobile breakpoints. Add aria-hidden.

findings.description: Noise texture overlay at 3% opacity may be invisible on most monitors while adding rendering cost.
findings.recommendation: Test on standard sRGB display. If imperceptible, remove or increase to 5%.

summary: Iteration 2 shows meaningful progress on 7 of 10 flagged issues. Hero is scannable (bullets + stats), typography uses rem throughout (1 exception), agent grid expanded 8->12 with type badges, and a distinctive blueprint aesthetic with animated terminal demo gives the page personality. Overall score rose 59->65. However, the critical P0 blocker persists: all external GitHub links still return 404. The URL was changed but the repository doesn't exist. This caps craft at 48. Until the repo exists, the primary conversion funnel is broken. Next priorities: (1) Fix GitHub repo, (2) convert last px clamp to rem, (3) add one illustration.
